name: Chengtu Chicken- Szechuan
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken into 1-inch cubes.
2. Mix marinade ingredients in a medium bowl and add chicken, mixing well. Let stand for 20 minutes.
3. Mix seasoning sauce ingredients in a small cup and set aside.
4. Heat 1 cup of peanut oil in a wok over medium heat for 1 minute.
5. Stir-fry marinated chicken cubes until lightly browned, about 1 minute. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain well over the wok. Set aside.
6. Remove most oil from the wok, leaving 2 tablespoons.
7. Heat remaining oil in the wok over medium heat for 30 seconds.
8. Add spinach and salt to the hot oil. Stir-fry until spinach is tender, about 1 minute. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain well over the wok. Arrange around the outside of a warm platter.
9. Add 3 tablespoons of oil to the hot wok and heat for 1 minute.
10. Add ginger, garlic, green onion, and hot bean sauce to the hot oil. Stir-fry until fragrant, about 1-2 minutes.
11. Add chicken cubes and seasoning sauce mixture to the hot oil. Stir-fry until the sauce thickens slightly.
12. Add 1 teaspoon of sesame oil to the wok and stir to mix.
13. Place the chicken mixture in the middle of the platter with spinach.
Makes 4 servings.
